rules.title: Button must have an accessible label
rules.description: Every button must have a non-empty accessible name computable by the accessibility tree. Satisfied by: visible text inside .btn__text, an aria-label attribute on the root, or aria-labelledby pointing to an existing element.
rules.expected: element has accessible name via text content OR aria-label OR aria-labelledby

conditions: element has non-empty trimmed text content
element has aria-labelledby whose target has non-empty text content

rules.message: Button has no accessible label. Add visible text inside .btn__text or set aria-label on the button element.
rules.fix: Add Label as a child, or set aria-label="Action description" on the root element.

rules.title: Icon-only button must have aria-label
rules.description: A button carrying .btn--icon-only has no visible text. The accessible name must be provided via aria-label on the root element. The SVG inside .btn__icon must carry aria-hidden='true'.
rules.expected: element has non-empty aria-label AND .btn__icon has aria-hidden='true'
rules.message: Icon-only button is missing aria-label. Screen reader users cannot determine the button's purpose.
rules.fix: Add aria-label="Describe the action" to the root button element. Ensure the SVG wrapper has aria-hidden="true".

rules.title: Toggle button must declare aria-pressed
rules.description: A button that toggles a persistent on/off state must communicate that state via aria-pressed. Value must be 'true' or 'false' — never omitted or 'undefined'.

check.trigger: element has data-toggle attribute or is annotated as toggle in audit configuration

rules.message: Toggle button is missing aria-pressed. Set aria-pressed='false' on default and toggle to 'true' when active.
rules.fix: Add aria-pressed="false" to the button element. Update it to "true" via JavaScript when the toggle is active.

rules.title: Focus ring must not be suppressed
rules.description: The button stylesheet defines a visible two-layer focus ring via :focus-visible. Any override that sets outline:none without an equivalent border or box-shadow replacement violates WCAG 2.4.7.
rules.expected: computed styles include a visible border or outline — outline:none not present without replacement
rules.message: Focus ring is suppressed on .btn:focus-visible. Keyboard users cannot see which button is focused.
rules.fix: Remove the outline:none override. If a custom focus style is needed, preserve the border/box-shadow focus indicator defined in button.css.

rules.title: Disabled button must use correct mechanism for its intent
rules.description: HTML disabled removes the element from tab order. aria-disabled='true' keeps it in tab order. Using aria-disabled without HTML disabled, combined with tabindex='-1', contradicts the intended behavior and should be flagged.
rules.expected: if aria-disabled='true' without HTML disabled: tabindex is not '-1'

allowed_patterns.note: Removes from tab order — standard disabled
Stays in tab order — use for discoverable disabled with tooltip
Belt-and-suspenders — both attributes, removes from tab order

invalid_combinations.reason: Contradictory — aria-disabled without HTML disabled is intended to keep element in tab order

rules.message: Button uses aria-disabled='true' but also has tabindex='-1', preventing keyboard access to a button that should be discoverable.
rules.fix: Remove tabindex='-1'. aria-disabled without HTML disabled is intentionally kept in tab order so screen reader users can discover the unavailable action.

rules.title: Must use semantic interactive element
rules.description: The .btn class must be applied only to <button>, <a>, or <input type='submit|button|reset'>. Non-interactive elements require explicit role='button' and tabindex='0'.
rules.expected: element tag is 'button', 'a', or 'input' — OR has role='button' and tabindex
rules.message: Button is rendered as a <{tag}> element without role='button'. Use <button> instead or add role='button' tabindex='0'.

rules.title: Interactive elements must not be nested inside buttons
rules.description: HTML forbids interactive content inside a button. Nesting causes undefined browser behavior and breaks keyboard navigation.
rules.expected: no descendant elements that are button, a, input, select, textarea, or details
rules.message: Button contains a nested interactive element <{tag}>. Remove the nested element.
rules.fix: Extract the nested interactive element outside the button. Restructure the layout to avoid nesting.

rules.title: Colors must reference design tokens, not hardcoded values
rules.description: All color values applied to .btn elements must reference CSS custom properties (var(--token-name)). Hardcoded hex, rgb(), or hsl() values bypass the token system and break theme compliance.
rules.expected: background, color, border-color, outline-color all use var(--) — or are transparent, none, inherit, currentColor
rules.message: Hardcoded color '{value}' found on '{property}'. Replace with the corresponding design token.
rules.fix: Replace e.g. background: #1B8354 with var(--button-primary-bg-default). See token surface in button.contract.md §14.

rules.title: Multiple primary buttons in the same visual group
rules.description: More than one .btn--primary in the same section or dialog dilutes visual hierarchy. Government standards require a single clear primary action per context.
rules.expected: max 1 occurrence within the nearest role=group, role=dialog, role=main, or form ancestor
rules.message: {count} primary buttons found in the same context. Reduce to one primary and demote others to secondary or subtle.
rules.fix: Change the second .btn--primary to .btn--secondary-outline or .btn--subtle to restore clear action hierarchy.

rules.title: Button must not use physical CSS properties that break RTL
rules.description: Physical directional properties on .btn or its children cause visual defects under dir='rtl'. Use logical properties (padding-inline, margin-inline, border-inline) instead.
rules.expected: padding-left, padding-right, margin-left, margin-right, border-left, border-right are absent
rules.message: Physical CSS property '{property}' found. Replace with the logical equivalent to preserve RTL layout.
rules.fix: Replace padding-left/right with padding-inline-start/end. Replace margin-left/right with margin-inline-start/end.

rules.title: Button label exceeds recommended length
rules.description: Labels longer than 40 characters cause unpredictable text wrapping within the fixed-height container defined by size tokens.
rules.expected: text content length is between 2 and 40 characters inclusive
rules.message: Button label has {count} characters (max 40). Shorten the label or restructure the UI.
rules.fix: Reduce the label to 40 characters or fewer. If the action requires more context, use a tooltip or helper text outside the button.

severity_legend.error: Blocks release. Must be resolved before component ships to production.
severity_legend.warning: Must be reviewed. Should be resolved; requires documented justification to waive.
severity_legend.info: Advisory. No action required but noted in audit report.

validation_status_legend.not_run: Rule has been defined but not yet executed against this component.
validation_status_legend.pass: Rule was executed and the component passed.
validation_status_legend.fail: Rule was executed and the component failed. See audit report for details.
validation_status_legend.skipped: Rule was intentionally skipped with documented justification.
validation_status_legend.manual_required: Rule cannot be validated automatically and requires human review.
